name: Harmon Apple Music
description: Standalone Apple Music provider pack for catalog, library, playlists, recent-play signals, and Harmon session seeding.

notes: I keep the Apple developer token and user token in one local auth file.
MusicKit bootstrap requires a local browser session and an Apple Music account.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_DEVELOPER_TOKEN
env.description: Direct Apple Music developer token for catalog access.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_TEAM_ID
env.description: Apple team ID used when I generate a developer token locally.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_KEY_ID
env.description: Apple Music private key identifier used for ES256 JWT signing.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
env.description: Path to the Apple Music private key PEM file.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_STOREFRONT
env.description: Default storefront used by the Apple Music API client.

env.name: APPLE_MUSIC_BOOTSTRAP_URL
env.description: Local MusicKit bootstrap page opened by npm run auth.

notes: I can generate the developer token locally when APPLE_MUSIC_TEAM_ID, APPLE_MUSIC_KEY_ID, and APPLE_MUSIC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH are present.
I cannot silently refresh the Apple user token; rerun npm run auth when the MusicKit session expires.
